name: DOUGLAS DYNAMICS, INC
summary: Douglas Dynamics, Inc. is North America's premier manufacturer and upfitter of commercial work truck attachments and equipment. Operating for over 75 years, the company produces snowplows, sand and salt spreaders, municipal snow and ice control products, and truck upfitting services under brands including FISHER, SNOWEX, WESTERN, HENDERSON, DEJANA, VENCO, and VENTURO. Products are sold through approximately 3,000 distributor points of sale primarily to professional snowplowers, municipalities, and commercial fleet operators across the U.S. and Canada.

products.name: FISHER Snowplows
products.description: Snow and ice control attachments for light trucks sold under the FISHER brand.

products.name: SNOWEX Spreaders
products.description: Sand and salt spreaders for light trucks sold under the SNOWEX brand.

products.name: WESTERN Snowplows
products.description: Snow and ice control attachments for light trucks sold under the WESTERN brand.

products.name: HENDERSON Municipal Products
products.description: Manufactured municipal snow and ice control products and truck upfitting services.

products.name: DEJANA Upfit Solutions
products.description: Upfitting services and storage solutions for commercial work trucks and vans.

products.name: VENCO/VENTURO Cranes and Hoists
products.description: Truck-mounted service cranes and dump hoists with related parts and accessories.

products.name: Parts and Accessories
products.description: Full range of parts and accessories supporting snow and ice control equipment lifecycle.

products.name: Cable Pulling Equipment
products.description: Specialized cable pulling equipment for trucks offered through Work Truck Solutions segment.

partnerships.description: Bailment and floor plan agreements with OEM vehicle manufacturers to supply truck chassis for custom upfitting.
